tooltip.block.quicklink.item_plug.1: Moves items between inventories. PLUG side = source, POINT side = destination.
tooltip.block.quicklink.fluid_plug.1: Transfers fluids between tanks. PLUG side = source, POINT side = destination.
tooltip.block.quicklink.energy_plug.1: Transfers FE energy between machines. PLUG side = source, POINT side = destination.
tooltip.quicklink.plug.use: Same color = connected. RMB: cycle role | Shift+RMB: toggle / remove upgrade | Dye: color
tooltip.item.quicklink.quicklink_upgrade: RMB on plug: install | Shift+RMB empty hand on plug: remove
